Sannel.Encoding.Manager
Table of Contents

Class EncodeQueueItem

Namespace
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.Web.Features.Queue.Entities
Assembly
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.Data.dll

A disk-level encode job. Individual track configs are stored in TracksJson.

public class EncodeQueueItem

Properties

AudioDefault

"Opus" or "Aac".

public string AudioDefault { get; set; }

Property Value

string

CompletedAt

When encoding completed or failed.

public DateTimeOffset? CompletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset?

CreatedAt 

public DateTimeOffset CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset

DiscPath

Physical path to the disc image / directory.

public string DiscPath { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DiscRootLabel

Filesystem root label for DiscPath. When set, DiscPath is root-relative (forward-slash). When null, DiscPath is an absolute path.

public string? DiscRootLabel { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Id 

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Mode

"Titles" or "Chapters".

public string Mode { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ProgressPercent

Encoding progress percentage (0-100) reported by the runner.

public int? ProgressPercent { get; set; }

Property Value

int?

RunnerName

Name of the runner that claimed this job.

public string? RunnerName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

StartedAt

When encoding started.

public DateTimeOffset? StartedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset?

Status

"Queued", "Encoding", "Finished", or "Failed".

public string Status { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TracksJson

JSON-serialized array of EncodeTrackConfig — only tracks with a non-empty OutputName.

public string TracksJson { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TvdbShowName 

public string? TvdbShowName { get; set; }

Property Value
